src/main/java/cn/programcx/foxnaserver/F.general_idea: Enable MyBatis mapper scanning by adding the @MapperScan annotation to the main application class.

src/main/java/cn/programcx/foxnaserver/j.general_idea: Add Jackson ObjectMapper import to enable JSON serialization for the broadcast message.
Rename configuration property from 'port' to 'broadcast.port' and add null-safety checks.
Introduce a new 'server.port' configuration property to distinguish the server port from the broadcast port.
Change the broadcast message payload from a plain string to a JSON object containing name, port, and ip.
src/main/java/cn/programcx/foxnaserver/j.human_impl: Map<String,Object> jsonMap = new HashMap<>(); jsonMap.put("name", ...); jsonMap.put("port", port); jsonMap.put("ip", addr); String msg = mapper.writeValueAsString(jsonMap);

src/main/java/cn/programcx/foxnaserver/j.general_idea: Update the UDP packet destination port to use the specific broadcast port variable instead of the server port.
src/main/java/cn/programcx/foxnaserver/j.human_impl: DatagramPacket packet = new DatagramPacket(buf, buf.length, address, bindPort);

src/main/java/cn/programcx/foxnaserver/j.general_idea: Remove the System.out.println debug statement that logged the sent message details.

src/test/java/cn/programcx/foxnaserver/F.general_idea: Add import for MyBatis MapperScan annotation to support database mapper scanning in tests.
Configure Spring Boot test to use a random port to avoid port conflicts during testing.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version from 17 to 21 in properties and compiler configuration.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.6.13 to 3.0.6 to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE.
Add MyBatis Plus starter for database interaction.
Add JJWT API for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT implementation for runtime JWT processing.
Add JJWT Jackson module for JSON serialization.
Add OSHI core for system monitoring capabilities.
Add Spring Boot AOP starter for aspect-oriented programming.
Add Knife4j starter for API documentation UI.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI starter for API documentation generation.
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.10.1 for better Java 21 support.
Remove explicit skip and repackage execution from Spring Boot Maven Plugin configuration.

config.properties.general_idea: Rename the port configuration key to align with Spring Boot standard property naming conventions.
Add a configuration property for a broadcast port, likely for network discovery or P2P features.
Add Spring Boot datasource configuration to enable MySQL database connectivity.
Add a configuration property for the JWT secret key used in authentication.
Add Spring Boot multipart configuration to allow large file uploads.
Add configuration for SpringDoc OpenAPI to customize the Swagger UI path.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Import an optional external configuration file to allow overriding default settings.
Specify the MySQL JDBC driver class for database connectivity.
Configure MyBatis-Plus to log SQL statements to stdout for debugging.
Set up file-based logging with rotation policies for application logs.
Reduce log verbosity for infrastructure components like MyBatis, JDBC, and HikariCP.
Increase maximum file and request size limits to support large file uploads.
Define a secret key for JWT token signing.
Set the expiration time for JWT tokens to 24 hours.
